landing.headline: Outfit your new office in one form.
landing.subhead: Tell us what you need. We send your list to three vetted Swedish suppliers — new and second-hand. Compare quotes side by side. Pick the best one. Done.

industry.title: Built for the way your team actually works.
industry.subhead: Pick your industry. We'll preset the right equipment, compliance flags, and supplier shortlist — then send your list to three vetted partners. New, refurbished, or both.

errors.createFailed: Couldn't create project. Please check your input.

landing.title: Closing your office?
landing.subtitle: Get paid for your existing furniture instead of dumping it. We match you with buyers who are looking for exactly what you have.

1.title: List what you have
1.desc: Briefly describe the items — quantity, condition, and an optional asking price. Takes about 5 minutes.

2.title: We match
2.desc: We connect you with buyers requesting similar equipment, or buy directly for larger lots.

3.title: You get paid
3.desc: The buyer arranges pickup. Payment runs through OfficeKit before pickup happens — safe for both sides.

why.title: Why sell with OfficeKit?
why.a: Circular: your furniture gets a second life instead of landfill. You can document your CO₂ savings.
why.b: Fast: we already have the buyer base — many new offices are looking for used furniture right now for budget and sustainability reasons.
why.c: No upfront fees. We take a small matching fee only when a sale closes.

1.a: Anything from single chairs and tables to a full office's contents. We're especially interested in sit-stand desks, ergonomic chairs, meeting tables, storage units, and AV gear.

2.a: You can suggest an asking price (or leave it blank for us to estimate based on similar items in our catalog). Buyers may make offers — you always decide whether to accept.

3.a: Listing is free. We take a 10% matching fee only after a sale completes. No fees if nothing sells.

form.title: Tell us what you're selling
form.subtitle: We'll get back within 24 hours with an estimated valuation and next steps. No photos needed right now — we'll ask if there's interest.

sections.itemsHint: List each furniture type separately. Add as many rows as you need.
sections.notesHint: Anything special we should know? Time-sensitive, pickup location, package deal, etc.

fields.notesPlaceholder: e.g. We're moving Sept 15, furniture ready for pickup in Solna…

errors.network: Network error — please try again in a moment.

thanks.title: Thanks — we've got your listing.
thanks.subtitle: We've registered {itemCount} line items for {companyName}. A confirmation email is on its way.
thanks.step1: One of us will read through the listing and respond within 24 hours with an estimated valuation.
thanks.step2: If you approve, we publish the listing and match it against active buyer projects.
thanks.step3: If a buyer is interested, we coordinate pickup and payment for you.

aiBuild.title: Describe your office
aiBuild.subtitle: Describe your office in your own words — we'll draft a starting checklist; you tweak the rest.
aiBuild.placeholder: e.g. ‘25-person fintech office in Stockholm, hybrid Tue/Thu, sit-stand desks'
aiBuild.buildingHint: Takes ~5–10 seconds. You'll land on the checklist when it's ready.

errors.notConfigured: AI builder is not configured on this deployment (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing).
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests right now — wait a minute and try again.
errors.invalidProposal: AI proposed items that aren't in the catalog — try again or use the manual flow.
errors.buildFailed: Couldn't build a proposal — try again or use the manual flow.
errors.offline: Network error — try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong — please try again.

floorplan.title: Your floor plan
floorplan.subhead: Drag items from the palette onto the canvas. Click to select and delete.

upload.dropOrClick: Drop or click to upload a floor plan
upload.formats: PNG, JPG, WebP, or PDF (max 8 MB)

errors.invalidType: Unsupported file type — use PNG, JPG, WebP, or PDF
errors.pdfFailed: Couldn't read the PDF — try an image file instead

request.title: Request 3 quotes
request.subhead: We'll send your spec to three vetted suppliers. Expect a response within 3–4 business hours.

form.magicSentPrefix: Check your inbox — we sent a sign-in link to
form.magicSentSuffix: . Click it to finish sending the request.

empty.title: No orders yet
empty.body: Your placed orders will appear here once you accept a quote.

quotes.title: Compare quotes
quotes.subtitle: {received} of {expected} suppliers responded
quotes.noQuotesYet: No quotes yet — we're still waiting on supplier responses.

confirm.title: Confirm order
confirm.paymentNotice: Payment will be handled in the next step.
confirm.lostReasonLabel: Tell the other suppliers what tipped your decision (optional)

orders.title: My orders
orders.emptyBody: Your placed orders will appear here once you accept a quote.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your email, password and 2FA code.

recovery.title: Save your recovery codes
recovery.body: Store these somewhere safe — they let you log in if you lose your authenticator.
